label: short
chain_of_thought: Okay.  A regular bagel has one hole in the center.  When I slice it in half vertically, I'm dividing the bagel into two equal parts.  The hole, however, is not affected by the cut.  Each half will still have access to the same hole.  Therefore, the total number of holes is still one.  The two pieces of the bagel each have half of the hole, but it's still one continuous hole.
